name: @bemodest/schema-definitions
description: JSON Schemas for polyglot type generation

scripts.generate:rs: quicktype -s schema schemas/AlertRule.json schemas/SidecarConfigPayload.json schemas/NormalizedTicker.json -o ../../apps/sidecar/src/types/generated.rs --visibility public --derive-debug --derive-clone
scripts.build: pnpm run generate:ts && pnpm run generate:rs
